response.overview: At MVPW 02, unified super featherweight champion Alycia "The Bomb" Baumgardner successfully defended her WBA, WBO, and IBF titles by defeating Bo Mi Re Shin via a dominant 10-round unanimous decision. The event took place on Friday, 17 April 2026, at the Infosys Theater at Madison Square Garden in New York City.
response.tagline: Tension is high. Stakes are higher.
response.title: MVPW 02: Baumgardner vs. Shin
